blocks.text:
If you're uncertain about how to set up Internet Connection Sharing, you can follow the instructions provided in this [video](https://youtu.be/ydYXeaLyLcM?si=rKh8Pc8D6S55-jGa) or [this guide](https://github.com/Crayphish/vrdocs/wiki/Internet-Connection-Sharing)

If you have issues with ICS not working after a computer restart (even after applying the registry fix), you can try [this script](https://discord.com/channels/564087419918483486/692030889932095529/1178882282229075978)
